untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit cointegration testing via Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) test and OLS-calculated hedge ratio (1.6766) between two assets (GLD and GDX). The allowed indicator set does not include multivariate cointegration testing, cross-asset hedge ratio calculations, or residual spread construction from pairs. The zscore_20 approximation assumes a pre-computed spread but cannot validate the ADF t-statistic threshold (-3.819 to -3.343) or enforce the specific hedge ratio. A pairs-trading engine with dedicated cointegration diagnostics is required for proper implementation.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using zscore_20 as proxy for mean-reverting spread behavior. Entry triggers when z-score deviates >2σ (long) or <-2σ (short), exit when reverting toward mean. This cannot replace proper cointegration validation and hedge ratio enforcement. AUTHOR_SILENT parameters (lookback_period, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) were not translated; stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max set to reasonable defaults.
